body: I've started on the wireframes. Going with a full-bleed hero section and asymmetric layout for the feature cards.
Love the direction! Make sure we use the new brand gradient for the hero background. I'll share the color specs.
Let's make sure the CTA button is prominent above the fold. We saw a 15% conversion drop last quarter when it was below.
Done! The palette is in Figma. I used the APCA contrast method instead of WCAG 2.1 — it gives better results for our dark theme.
Looks great. The blue-to-purple gradient on interactive elements is really nice. Approved!
Migration complete. All /v1/users endpoints now have /v2 equivalents. Backward compat maintained with deprecation headers.
Tested the new endpoints. Response times are ~20ms faster due to the optimized serialization. Nice work!
This one is more complex than /users. The nested resources (sections, members, status updates) need careful pagination handling.
I'll pick this up after the /projects migration is done so we can reuse the pagination pattern.
Q2 goals finalized: 25% increase in blog traffic, 10K new email subscribers, 15% improvement in trial-to-paid conversion.
Working on the content calendar. Planning 3 posts/week on LinkedIn, 5/week on Twitter, and 2 blog posts/month.
Can we coordinate on the visual assets? I want to make sure the social media templates match the new brand guidelines.
Project initialized with React Native 0.74, TypeScript 5.4, and React Navigation 6. CI is green on both iOS and Android.
Starting with the login screen. Using the same auth flow as the web app but with biometric support on top.
Button component is done with all 4 variants, 3 sizes, loading state, and icon support. Storybook stories included.
These look solid! The focus ring on the ghost variant could be a bit more visible though. Minor nit.
Retro summary: good velocity on API work, but frontend tasks took longer than estimated. Need better cross-team estimation.
Found the root cause — the session TTL check was using server time instead of UTC. Fix is straightforward.
Good catch. Let's add a regression test for timezone handling in sessions while we're at it.
Planning to use FlatList with a virtualized window of 20 items. Should handle 1000+ tasks smoothly on older devices.
Hey @Priya Patel, can you share the Figma link for the hero section?
@John Smith the nav component needs to support keyboard navigation too.
Background video adds 2MB to initial load. Considering lazy loading it after first paint.
Good call on the lazy load. We could use a static poster image as placeholder.
@John Smith can you review the JWT refresh token flow before I merge?
Reviewed. Looks solid. One suggestion: reduce the refresh token TTL from 30 days to 7.
Updated. Also added token rotation on refresh for extra security.
@Sarah Connor the cursor-based pagination is much cleaner than offset. Great choice.
Task CRUD is about 70% done. The tricky part is handling concurrent updates to position fields.
Use optimistic locking with a version column. We had the same issue on the projects endpoint.
@Emily Chen can you review the blog post outlines when you get a chance?
Reviewed! The first two outlines look great. Post #3 needs more technical depth for our developer audience.
Templates done for all three platforms. Used the new brand colors and 16:9 aspect ratio for LinkedIn.
@Admin User need your sign-off on the Q2 target numbers before we finalize.
Numbers look good. Approved. Make sure we have weekly tracking in place from day one.
Biometric auth is working on iOS. Android fingerprint API has a different flow, working on it.
@Alex Rivera can you test the biometric flow on the Pixel 7? I only have a Samsung.
Firebase Cloud Messaging setup complete. Push tokens are being stored in user profiles.
Nice. Can you also add notification grouping? Don't want to spam users with individual notifications.
@Sarah Connor should we support swipe-to-complete in the task list? It's an Asana feature users love.
Yes, definitely. Also add swipe-to-delete with a confirmation step.
Task detail view is rendering. Comment thread and subtask list are working. Attachments view is next.
@Priya Patel can you review the task detail layout? Want to make sure it matches the web version.
Components are looking great across all breakpoints. Dark mode toggle is smooth with 200ms transition.
Input component handles all variants. The date picker needs a separate implementation for mobile.
Color tokens are finalized. @Emily Chen please review the semantic mapping.
Writing docs for the first 5 components. Using MDX format for live examples.
Progress bar supports both determinate and indeterminate modes. Circular variant renders as an SVG ring.
The SVG ring animation is buttery smooth. @John Smith can we use this in the task completion view?
Sprint 1 scope: 15 tasks, 42 story points. Velocity target is 40 based on historical data.
Sounds achievable. I can take on the API tasks since they're blocking frontend work.
@Alex Rivera what were the main blockers you hit in Sprint 1?
Main blocker was waiting for the staging environment. Once that was up, things moved quickly.
Found 12 tech debt items. Top 3: legacy auth middleware, untyped API responses, no request validation.
@Sarah Connor I've groomed the top 20 backlog items. Ready for estimation in planning.
Cross-team dependencies mapped. Design team is the critical path for the mobile app launch.
OKRs aligned. Sprint goals directly map to Q2 objective #2 (platform modernization).
@Marcus Johnson the untyped API responses are affecting the marketing dashboard too. Prioritizing this.
Release checklist draft is done. Includes: code review, staging deploy, smoke tests, production deploy, monitoring.
@Priya Patel make sure design system OKRs are included in the alignment check.
